rag_rules: Place assumptions and guarantees referring to component ports in the component type scope.
Use `assign` only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts reside within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
Use case-provided thresholds and visible feature names for range assumptions/guarantees.
Align helper declaration types with expression types (bool, int, real).
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Define range checks as boolean expressions: `eq range_value : bool = x >= min_value and x <= max_value;`
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions without corresponding ports or constants.
Avoid range comparisons or equality checks on Boolean or opaque data ports unless a numeric scalar representation exists.
irrelevant_topics: AADL structural extraction details (component types, implementations, features, connections, properties, owners)
